title: Trade Support Analyst (Markets Operations) – Contract
description:
Job Description

We are hiring a Trade Support Analyst to join the Markets Operations team supporting a leading global financial institution. This role works closely with Sales, Trading, Technology, Legal, and Compliance teams to ensure smooth trade execution, strong operational risk control, and full regulatory compliance across the trade lifecycle.

The role is well-suited for candidates with prior trading desk support or post-trade operations experience who thrive in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment.

Key Responsibilities

How You Will Fulfil Your Potential

  • Build and maintain strong working relationships with Sales, Trading, Technology, and other stakeholders to resolve complex trade-related issues in a timely manner

  • Manage real-time trade booking exceptions, coordinating internally between Trading and Sales desks

  • Coordinate with external clients and internal teams to ensure timely execution of:

    • Economic affirmations

    • Legal confirmations

    • Trade settlements

  • Monitor and manage operational risk throughout the full trade processing lifecycle

  • Partner with Legal, Compliance, and Operations teams to ensure adherence to:

    • Financial regulatory reforms

    • Internal risk management frameworks

    • Industry-wide market practices

  • Implement firm-wide policies governing the trade confirmation process to strengthen fraud prevention controls

  • Support the build-out and enhancement of systems and processes to meet regulatory, industry, and new business requirements

  • Collaborate with regional and global Operations teams on strategic initiatives and projects

Requirements

Basic Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree (BA or BS required)

  • Strong attention to detail with a structured and disciplined approach to work

  • Ability to manage priorities and perform effectively in a high-pressure, fast-paced environment

  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to engage multiple stakeholders

  • Sound judgment, problem-solving, and critical thinking abilities

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel, with ability to learn new systems quickly

Preferred Qualifications

  • 2–5 years of experience in Trade Support, Markets Operations, or Financial Services Operations

  • Prior exposure to trading desk support, confirmations, or settlements

  • Understanding of financial products and post-trade processes

  • Familiarity with regulatory and compliance-driven operating environments

  • Experience working in a global financial institution is an advantage

    All Curriculum Vitaes will be treated with the strictest confidentiality. By sending us your personal data, you are deemed to consent to RMA Consultants Pte Ltd and its affiliates collecting, using and disclosing your personal data for the purposes set out in our Data Protection Policy at http://bit.ly/3GHgskn and Privacy Policy at http://bit.ly/3W63rp7.

    "This is in partnership with the Employment and Employability Institute Pte Ltd (“e2i”).e2i is the empowering network for workers and employers seeking employment and employability solutions.e2i serves as a bridge between workers and employers, connecting with workers to offer job security through job-matching, career guidance and skills upgrading services, and partnering employers to address their manpower needs through recruitment, training, and job redesign solutions. e2i is a tripartite initiative of the National Trades Union Congress set up to support nation-wide manpower and skills upgrading initiatives. By applying for this role, you consent to RMA Groups’s PDPA and e2i’s PDPA."

    We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

    Syed Hafiz

    EA Regn No: R21103431

    RMA Consultants EA License No: 93C4403

postedCompany.description:
RMA Contracts is a professional Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) service provider that is dedicated to delivering a spectrum of innovative BPO services using cutting-edge technology for business success.


As a one-stop integrated BPO partner, RMA Contracts is focus-driven on providing adept business solutions to streamline core business practices in today's challenging business environment in the areas of HR Consultancy, Recruitment and Manpower Outsourcing, Digitisation and Transaction Processing, Customer Relations and Managed Services.
